title: The Little Guys
description: The Little Guys is a re-imagining of the class Clay Soldiers mod from the Minecraft Beta days.
body:
# The Little Guys
The Little Guys is a mod that re-imagines the old Clay Soldiers mod from the Minecraft Beta days. 

## Crafting
![All the Simple 2x2 crafting recipes](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/of19plFw/images/12851aa72d9017c3c96323f10925abf13df83e98.png)

You can make a few little guys using a block of clay and a block of soul sand.  Additionally, you can split a soulsand block into Tiny Soulsand Piles, which can be crafted with a clay ball to create a single little guy.  Add a dye to either recipe to change their color and create teams.

A Little Horse can be constructed using Clay balls, a Saddle, and a Tiny Soulsand Pile like so:

![Little Horse Crafting Recipe](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/of19plFw/images/8bbe1a4c6a025e688c1623f038671d4ce2567c2f.png)


## Videos

## Other Features
Little Guys can be deployed using dispensers!
